title: Runtime Table Control Room
concept: A table-led WordPress Playground operations workspace that makes runtime settings, saved/local/temporary storage, replacement consequences, manager tools, command search, and transfer states mutate one selected Playground object beside a protected live WordPress shell.
focus: runtime settings control room with visible reset and reload consequences
admin table plus selected detail object model
stateful saved, local, temporary, imported, exported, and deleted rows
command search discovery with grouped results and executable forms
flows: Transform the active temporary row through Save in this browser with file-copy progress, saved identity, shell title, path, storage badge, table row, preview, and event history updates.
Save to a local directory as a distinct destination with folder permission, copy progress, local storage identity, reconnect-after-refresh consequence, and Save & Reload behavior.

Complete a file and database operation end to end: edit wp-config.php into a dirty state, save it with validation/progress/log result, and download database.sqlite with progress, size mutation, and event record.
Use command search end to end by querying grouped commands, selecting a command form, running progress, and mutating the active path, runtime selector, database row, or GitHub export row.
Confirm destructive or replacement flows for delete, runtime reset, Blueprint run, and ZIP import, with cancel, progress, final row state, active shell fallback, and preview mutation.
Use Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip without hiding the live WordPress shell.
Start new Playgrounds from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import with account connection, Blueprint URL, and .zip import using route-specific inputs and constraints.
Browse an honestly labeled representative subset of the 43-entry Blueprint gallery with categories, search, selected detail, copy, download, validation, and run actions.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview with PR number or URL
Gutenberg PR or branch preview with PR, URL, or branch input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored caveat
Blueprint URL runner
Import .zip with native chooser framing, validation, replacement warning, progress, and imported active identity
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset labeled 6 shown of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Friends feed reader, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder permission and reconnect consequence
Save progress with file-copy counts
Saved and unsaved Playground list in an admin table
Rename saved Playground
Delete saved Playground with confirmation and final deleted state
Active path input, refresh, Homepage, and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, local-directory, imported, exported, and deleted row states
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network, and multisite settings
Destructive reset for temporary sites and Save & Reload for saved/local sites
Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint, database, and logs tabs
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected editor, dirty state, save progress, and result
Blueprint editor with validation, copy link, download bundle, run, replacement warning, progress, and result
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with operation results
Export to GitHub with account connection, progress, and exported row state
Download as .zip
Portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle download
Transfer history recording save, local permission, rename, delete, import, export, file, database, Blueprint, path, and runtime events
